summary: REQ-28 appears implemented in the three Bed Bugs section components by replacing Lucide icons with an pointing to the requested generated asset path and using an English alt text. REQ-27 is not satisfied in the provided diff summary because no new static image file was added under frontend/public/assets/generated. Additionally, the diff includes unrelated documentation/state updates describing new features/content outside this request.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a new static “Quick Tip” icon image asset file under frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filename bed-bugs-quick-tip-icon.dim_128x128.png (transparent background; legible at 16–24px).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary shows no added files, so there is no evidence that the required PNG asset was created under frontend/public/assets/generated.

hallucinated_features.description: Documentation/state describing expanded scope (new pests like scorpions/mice, new Photo Scanner tab/UI, header branding changes, Heat Treatment checklist changes) which are explicitly listed as non-goals for this request.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly says not to add new pests/tabs/educational sections and not to change Heat Treatment behavior. The diff includes updates to summary/state files describing these changes even though they were not requested.
